subcodes.first_line: Praise be to the Sovereign of Manifestation, Who, through the Most Glorious Name, hath illumined the world of names with the light of guidance. He is the Most Great Name and [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد مالک ظهور را که باسم ابهی عالم اسما را بنور هدی منور نمود اوست اسم اعظم و
subcodes.subjects: @permission for visit; pilgrimage, @prayer for nearness to God, @praise and encouragement, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @prayer for specific individuals; groups
